hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH"; { APP="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/sr-search"; PY=$(uv python find --project "$APP" --no-config) && PYTHONPATH="$APP/src" "$PY" -m stockroom shim rectify --owner claude --app-dir "$APP"; stockroom dashboard; } >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
